## What is Vtiger CRM?

Vtiger is an all-in-one CRM platform that rolls sales automation, marketing campaigns, customer support, project management, and inventory into a single product called Vtiger One. The underlying "Customer One View" concept gives every team — sales, support, marketing — a unified record for each customer rather than siloed data per department.

## Who is it for?

Vtiger is aimed at small and mid-size businesses that want to replace multiple point tools with one platform and don't want to pay Salesforce prices. The open-source edition also makes it a popular choice for technical teams that need a self-hostable, customizable CRM without per-seat licensing costs.

## Strengths

- **True all-in-one** — sales, help desk, marketing, projects, and inventory in one subscription.
- **Customer One View** — every team shares a single customer record, reducing context-switching and duplication.
- **Open-source option** — self-hostable at no license cost, with full source code available for customization.
- **Affordable cloud entry** — cloud plans from $12/user/month make it accessible for small teams.
- **Workflow automation** — built-in automation for follow-ups, assignments, approvals, and notifications.

## What to consider

- The interface can feel dense; navigating across the many modules takes some onboarding effort.
- Support quality varies by plan tier — smaller plans get limited support response times.
- Some advanced features like AI-driven insights are only available on higher-tier plans.

## Bottom line

Vtiger punches above its weight on feature breadth for the price. If you're a growing SMB tired of stitching together separate CRM, help desk, and marketing tools, Vtiger's all-in-one approach is worth a close look — especially if the open-source edition is on the table.
